properties.titulo_evento: A small town in Germany braces for end to decades of life with US troops
properties.descricao: A picturesque Bavarian town has hosted U.S. forces since the end of WWII and could bear the brunt of the U.S. military's withdrawal from Germany.

properties.descricao: Both sides had proclaimed a ceasefire surrounding the important celebration marking the Soviet Union’s contribution to victory over Nazi Germany.

properties.titulo_evento: US forces fire at, disable Iran-flagged tanker trying to evade blockade
properties.descricao: While President Trump said Project Freedom was paused, the U.S. Navy blockade continues to ban vessels from entering and exiting Iranian ports.

properties.titulo_evento: France moves aircraft carrier to Red Sea with eye on Hormuz mission
properties.descricao: France on Wednesday deployed its carrier strike group to the Red Sea as part of planning for a potential mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.descricao: President Emmanuel Macron has said any multinational initiative to secure the strait would only happen once the hottest phase of the conflict subsides.

properties.titulo_evento: Pakistan’s first Chinese submarine set to boost naval capability

properties.titulo_evento: Palestinian boy mourns father killed in Israeli strike on security post
properties.descricao: A Palestinian boy mourns his father, one of three people killed in an Israeli strike on a security post in Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: US issues new Cuba sanctions as UN experts warn of ‘energy starvation’
properties.descricao: Latest sanctions target military-controlled conglomerate, come as effective US fuel blockade continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Gulf states urge UN action to ensure Strait of Hormuz safety
properties.descricao: Draft resolution demands Iran halt attacks, pin-point mines and ensure passage of humanitarian aid through strait.

properties.descricao: Chinese and Iranian foreign ministers meet while a tense ceasefire holds.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel’s attacks and pressure sowing seeds for division in tense Lebanon
properties.descricao: Analysts say Israel aiming to exploit Lebanon’s divisions to force concessions amid military and political pressures.

properties.titulo_evento: Brazil’s Lula meets Trump amid efforts to avert new US trade tariffs
properties.descricao: Brazilian officials are hoping for the best outcome from the meeting, given tensions over Trump's tariff policy.

properties.titulo_evento: Man pleads guilty to Colorado firebombing, groups call for family reprieve
properties.descricao: June 2025 attack targeted supporters of Israeli captives in Gaza; Advocates say family of assailant unjustly targeted.

properties.titulo_evento: US sanctions Iraqi minister accused of aiding Iran oil sales
properties.descricao: US sanctions target Iraq's deputy oil minister for allegedly aiding Iran in bypassing restrictions on oil exports.

properties.descricao: The US accuses Ali Maarij al-Bahadly of helping Iran avoid sanctions and export its oil through Iraq.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon Latest Israeli strikes Beirut despite ‘ceasefire’
properties.descricao: Israel has carried out its first airstrike on Beirut’s southern suburbs since the April 16 US-brokered ceasefire.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump's 'irresponsible war' to blame for economic slowdown, German minister says
properties.descricao: Finance Minister Lars Klingbeil blamed the US president's "irresponsible war in Iran" for harming the Germany economy.

properties.titulo_evento: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
properties.descricao: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.

properties.titulo_evento: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
properties.descricao: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.

properties.titulo_evento: China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministers
properties.descricao: The announcement follows recent ousting of several top officials in China's military.

properties.titulo_evento: Disturbances and 127 arrests mar Paris party after PSG Champions League victory

properties.titulo_evento: Russia ignores Ukraine's unilateral ceasefire and attacks kindergarten
properties.descricao: Ukraine's president says Russia has "spurned the ceasefire" and Kyiv is deciding on further action to take.

properties.descricao: There are signs of fresh momentum to end the war, but Trump himself has injected a note of caution.

properties.titulo_evento: UK to summon Chinese ambassador after convictions over spying on Hong Kong dissidents

properties.titulo_evento: US underlines 'strong relationship' with Vatican as Rubio meets pope after Trump criticism
properties.descricao: Rubio's visit comes after US President Trump accused the pope of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy" after he made critical comments about the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East war will slow down economic growth in Africa as cost of living crisis soars, IMF warns
properties.descricao: According to the IMF's report, regional growth is expected to decline by 0.3 percentage points, and some 20 million people in Africa now face the risk of food insecurity as the Iran war raises energy and food prices.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia strikes Kharkiv residential district as drone attacks escalate
properties.descricao: A major Russian drone offensive struck Kharkiv’s Novobavarskyi district and other cities, injuring civilians and destroying homes despite Ukraine’s strong air defence.

properties.titulo_evento: Iranians at home divided between hope for regime change and war fears
properties.descricao: People in Iran who spoke to Euronews said they were torn between hope for regime change and fear of devastation, while reflecting on US-Israeli strikes, rising hardship and fading support for war.

properties.titulo_evento: Injury row, Sardinia trip, petition - Kylian Mbappé faces growing backlash from Real Madrid fans
properties.descricao: Injured Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé has sparked backlash from some fans after taking a holiday in Sardinia ahead of Sunday’s Clasico against Barcelona.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since ceasefire, reportedly killing Hezbollah commander
properties.descricao: Beirut and its southern suburbs had been spared Israeli attacks since 8 April, when massive Israeli strikes across the country killed more than 350 people.

properties.titulo_evento: Local elections across UK test Starmer as Reform UK eyes major gains
properties.descricao: UK voters began casting ballots on Thursday, 7 May, in local and devolved elections seen as the biggest political test yet for Prime Minister Keir Starmer since Labour’s landslide victory in July 2024.

properties.descricao: The Israeli military said on Thursday it "respects freedom of religion and worship, as well as holy sites and religious symbols of all religions and communities."

properties.descricao: North Korea has insisted that it will not give up its nuclear arsenal, describing its path as "irreversible" and vowing to strengthen its capabilities.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran reviewing US proposal on deal to end war as Trump ramps up pressure
properties.descricao: A fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has largely held since 8 April but in-person talks between the two countries hosted by Pakistan last month failed to reach an agreement.

properties.descricao: Paris Saint-Germain advanced to the Champions League final after holding Bayern Munich to a 1-1 draw and securing a 6-5 aggregate victory.

properties.titulo_evento: Is Russian oil becoming a lifeline for Southeast Asia?
properties.descricao: With oil, gas and fertilizer imports squeezed by the Iran war, Southeast Asian governments are brushing off EU pressure and treating Russian energy as a tool of economic survival.

properties.descricao: The visit by the US secretary of state to the Vatican comes as President Donald Trump continues to disparage the Catholic leader over criticism of the Iran war.

properties.titulo_evento: UK votes in key local and regional elections
properties.descricao: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour Party is expected to face major losses, perhaps spelling the end of his premiership. Reform, the Greens, Plaid Cymru and the SNP are all hoping to make gains.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump optimistic for deal as Tehran yet to respond
properties.descricao: Iran is reviewing the latest US proposal and will pass its response to Pakistan after "finalizing its views." Trump claimed the latest round of talks were "very good." DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany cracks down on neo-Nazi networks
properties.descricao: Police and prosecutors have launched a nationwide crackdown on young right-wing extremists. They are alleged to have formed criminal organizations and attacked members of the left-wing scene.

properties.descricao: Wei Fenghe and his successor Li Shangfu, were convicted on Thursday of accepting bribes.

properties.descricao: Brussels has urged Budapest to drop demand for €3.9 billion in loans to speed up EU payments.

properties.descricao: Stock investors are betting that companies will make enormous profits, despite the war. But investors in bonds, including U.S. Treasuries, have other concerns.
